title: task.v1
description: A task — a unit of work a unit produces or consumes (a to-do with state). Tasks live in the per-person workspace as a kg/entities/task/<slug>.md (a workspace.v1 entity) AND have this wire shape for the event bus (a task transition is itself an `event` trigger source). Created from meetings, email, routines, or chat.

plan_ref.description: optional workspace plan/doc the task is about

source.description: where it came from: meeting | email | routine | chat
